claudeMd:
# Adviser Harness — Organization Doctrine (managed)

This org uses the Adviser Group Claude Code harness (plugin: harness@adviser-group). Drive non-trivial work through the harness pipeline.

Harness skills, agents, protocols, and rules live in the installed plugin directory. To read a protocol/rule, first run `echo $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT`, then read `$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/protocols/<file>.md` or `$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rules/<file>.md`.

## Entry
Start every task via /harness:intake (classify + route), which drives /harness:pipeline (phases).

## Iron Laws (hooks enforce these — do not bypass)
1. No acceptance criterion ships without a failing-then-passing test for it plus >=70% mutation score on changed lines.
2. No completion claims without fresh verification evidence — re-run before claiming done.
3. The orchestrator never writes source code — it coordinates agents.
4. Repo HEAD stays on main — all HEAD-mutating git runs via worktree delegation.
5. No phase skipped, no gate bypassed, no skill omitted.
6. Findings surfaced in review are fixed in this pipeline — no follow-ups, no user questions.
7. Every pipeline produces an observation.

## Session start (automatic)
Check for an in-progress pipeline and resume it; if a merged PR is pending deploy, continue the deploy.

## Pipeline phase order
Plan -> Plan Validation -> Build (code-review as final step) -> Security Review -> Final Gate (Verify + Test + Accept + Patch Critique) -> Ship -> Deploy -> Reflect.

hooks.command: case "$(uname -s 2>/dev/null)" in Darwin|Linux|*BSD*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; mkdir -p "$C/logs" "$C/local-marketplaces" 2>/dev/null; D="$C/local-marketplaces/adviser-group"; t="${GITHUB_TOKEN:-${GH_TOKEN:-}}"; if [ -z "$t" ] && command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1; then t="$(gh auth token 2>/dev/null)"; fi; U="https://github.com/Adviser-Group/.claude.git"; if [ -n "$t" ]; then AU="https://x-access-token:${t}@github.com/Adviser-Group/.claude.git"; else AU="$U"; fi; ( umask 077; if [ -d "$D/.git" ]; then git -C "$D" pull --ff-only "$AU" main >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; else git clone --depth 1 "$AU" "$D" >/dev/null 2>&1 && git -C "$D" remote set-url origin "$U" >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; [ -f "$D/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json" ] || exit 0; claude plugin marketplace list 2>/dev/null | grep -q adviser-group || claude plugin marketplace add "$D"; if claude plugin list 2>/dev/null | grep -q adviser-group; then : > "$C/.adviser-harness-installed"; else claude plugin install harness@adviser-group && : > "$C/.adviser-harness-installed"; fi; claude plugin marketplace update adviser-group >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; claude plugin update harness@adviser-group >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ) >> "$C/logs/harness-bootstrap.log" 2>&1 & exit 0

[ "${ADVISER_HARNESS_OPT_OUT:-}" = "1" ] && exit 0; case "$(uname -s 2>/dev/null)" in Darwin|Linux|*BSD*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; [ -f "$C/.adviser-harness-installed" ] && exit 0; if [ -f "$C/plugins/known_marketplaces.json" ] && grep -q adviser-group "$C/plugins/known_marketplaces.json" 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Adviser harness not detected. It auto-installs on your NEXT Claude Code restart. If it does not: run gh auth login then restart. Logs: ~/.claude/logs/harness-bootstrap.log. One-off bypass: export ADVISER_HARNESS_OPT_OUT=1 then restart. Help #eng-harness."}}'; exit 0
